name: Aristocrat Leisure Limited
analysis: ALL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 25% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$52.9700. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$53.8700, stop A$49.0644, target A$68.2868 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
